title: Format dropdown column to show as a vertical list
excerpt: Brand new user, making first Workspace/Board. When I add a dropdown column and enter the items, they shows up like labels. How can I make them display in a vertical list, in alphabetical order, rather than the default la…

posts.author: GenMed (David Permenter)
posts.cookedHtml: Brand new user, making first Workspace/Board. When I add a dropdown column and enter the items, they shows up like labels. How can I make them display in a vertical list, in alphabetical order, rather than the default label-type view (for lack of a better description). Thanks!

posts.author: DebStat21 (Deborah)
posts.cookedHtml: I would also like to see the list in a vertical way as well
